TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_Singapura, title = Singapura, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/Singapura} }

S.FORM: Singapura (Minalayuan: Republik Singapura, Ljinautian: 新加坡, Tamil: சிங்கப்பூர் குடியரச) sihu cungtung siqivuan aicu a "新加坡" mavan a kemasi inamilikan a siqaivuan au masan a pinairangan a sirukaian. aicu a "新加坡" a inamilikan pinaka "Singapore" mavan a kemasi malay a kai a "Singapura" aya, saka kemasi auta tua van a kai "Siṃhapura" aya. aicu "Siṃhapura" a vecik, "simha" avan a "獅子" a imi, "pura" avan a kazatjan a imi. avan sika izua zuma a siqaivuan a "獅城" aya. au izua aicu a vinecikan tua kuni kata ljaicu a "魚尾獅" aya a sinipukeljang tu na kuni a langlangan. tazua ka tjaisangas ta sigapura masan ta kuni, aza sihu niamadju pinaka "新嘉坡" aicu a ngadan na kuni. ka 1967 a caviljan, aza sihu na sigapura lemingdjelj ta matateveteveljan a kangadanan a djalan, avan sika napatagilj a masengseng tua kangadanan na siqivuan a kadjunangan kata djalan a penuljat nua i singapura. ka 1972 a caviljan sikasepatj a qiljasan drusa puluq sa lima a qadavan, aicu a "新加坡" masan a paqulid a ngadan a ciniukuan. ljakua katjaisangas ta masan a kuni i kacauan, aicu a sigapura izua tjuruvu a siqaivuan, izua kata "實叻埠" aya, saka izua a zuma a madjulu a siqaivuan pinaka "星洲", "獅城" kata "星國" aya. kai sipatatevelak nua caucau sesingapura a matjalialiaw a kinakaian. sikiljavaran nua sihu a singapura izua kai a amilika, ciniukuan, kai a malay, katua kai a tamil. patjara kai nua kuka a singapura, makeljang a pinapuvecik aicu a malay nua kai a kuka i tua "hulic nua singapura a sinipaljavak," ayatua cinalivatan niamadju tua malaysia. ljakua, situlutulu a kai a amilika nua sinsi a singapura i gaku i singapura. sa tjaljapazangal a kai a amilika tua caucau a i singapura. pacunu uta Taiwan Pilipinas Malaysia Tailiku == kaizuanan ==
S.PHON: siŋapura (minaɭajuan: rəpubɭik siŋapura, ʎinautian: ***, tamiɭ: *********** *******) sihu ʦuŋtuŋ siqivuan aiʦu a "***" mavan a kəmasi inamiɭikan a siqaivuan au masan a pinairaŋan a sirukaian. aiʦu a "***" a inamiɭikan pinaka "siŋapurə" mavan a kəmasi maɭaj a kai a "siŋapura" aja, saka kəmasi auta tua van a kai "si*hapura" aja. aiʦu "si*hapura" a vəʦik, "simha" avan a "**" a imi, "pura" avan a kazaʦan a imi. avan sika izua zuma a siqaivuan a "**" aja. au izua aiʦu a vinəʦikan tua kuni kata ʎaiʦu a "***" aja a sinipukəʎaŋ tu na kuni a ɭaŋɭaŋan. tazua ka ʦaisaŋas ta sigapura masan ta kuni, aza sihu niamaɉu pinaka "***" aiʦu a ŋadan na kuni. ka **** a ʦaviʎan, aza sihu na sigapura ɭəmiŋɉəʎ ta matatəvətəvəʎan a kaŋadanan a ɉaɭan, avan sika napatagiʎ a masəŋsəŋ tua kaŋadanan na siqivuan a kaɉunaŋan kata ɉaɭan a pənuʎat nua i siŋapura. ka **** a ʦaviʎan sikasəpaʦ a qiʎasan ɖusa puɭuq sa ɭima a qadavan, aiʦu a "***" masan a paquɭid a ŋadan a ʦiniukuan. ʎakua kaʦaisaŋas ta masan a kuni i kaʦauan, aiʦu a sigapura izua ʦuruvu a siqaivuan, izua kata "***" aja, saka izua a zuma a maɉuɭu a siqaivuan pinaka "**", "**" kata "**" aja. kai sipatatəvəɭak nua ʦauʦau səsiŋapura a maʦaɭiaɭiaw a kinakaian. sikiʎavaran nua sihu a siŋapura izua kai a amiɭika, ʦiniukuan, kai a maɭaj, katua kai a tamiɭ. paʦara kai nua kuka a siŋapura, makəʎaŋ a pinapuvəʦik aiʦu a maɭaj nua kai a kuka i tua "huɭiʦ nua siŋapura a sinipaʎavak," ajatua ʦinaɭivatan niamaɉu tua maɭajsia. ʎakua, situɭutuɭu a kai a amiɭika nua sinsi a siŋapura i gaku i siŋapura. sa ʦaʎapazaŋaɭ a kai a amiɭika tua ʦauʦau a i siŋapura. paʦunu uta taiwan piɭipinas maɭajsia taiɭiku == kaizuanan ==
S.FORM: Singapura (Minalayuan: Republik Singapura, Ljinautian: 新加坡, Tamil: சிங்கப்பூர் குடியரச) sihu cungtung siqivuan aicu a "新加坡" mavan a kemasi inamilikan a siqaivuan au masan a pinairangan a sirukaian. aicu a "新加坡" a inamilikan pinaka "Singapore" mavan a kemasi malay a kai a "Singapura" aya, saka kemasi auta tua van a kai "Siṃhapura" aya. aicu "Siṃhapura" a vecik, "simha" avan a "獅子" a imi, "pura" avan a kazatjan a imi. avan sika izua zuma a siqaivuan a "獅城" aya. au izua aicu a vinecikan tua kuni kata ljaicu a "魚尾獅" aya a sinipukeljang tu na kuni a langlangan. tazua ka tjaisangas ta sigapura masan ta kuni, aza sihu niamadju pinaka "新嘉坡" aicu a ngadan na kuni. ka 1967 a caviljan, aza sihu na sigapura lemingdjelj ta matateveteveljan a kangadanan a djalan, avan sika napatagilj a masengseng tua kangadanan na siqivuan a kadjunangan kata djalan a penuljat nua i singapura. ka 1972 a caviljan sikasepatj a qiljasan drusa puluq sa lima a qadavan, aicu a "新加坡" masan a paqulid a ngadan a ciniukuan. ljakua katjaisangas ta masan a kuni i kacauan, aicu a sigapura izua tjuruvu a siqaivuan, izua kata "實叻埠" aya, saka izua a zuma a madjulu a siqaivuan pinaka "星洲", "獅城" kata "星國" aya. kai sipatatevelak nua caucau sesingapura a matjalialiaw a kinakaian. sikiljavaran nua sihu a singapura izua kai a amilika, ciniukuan, kai a malay, katua kai a tamil. patjara kai nua kuka a singapura, makeljang a pinapuvecik aicu a malay nua kai a kuka i tua "hulic nua singapura a sinipaljavak," ayatua cinalivatan niamadju tua malaysia. ljakua, situlutulu a kai a amilika nua sinsi a singapura i gaku i singapura. sa tjaljapazangal a kai a amilika tua caucau a i singapura. pacunu uta Taiwan Pilipinas Malaysia Tailiku == kaizuanan ==
S.PHON: siŋapura (minaɭajuan: rəpubɭik siŋapura, ʎinautian: ***, tamiɭ: *********** *******) sihu ʦuŋtuŋ siqivuan aiʦu a "***" mavan a kəmasi inamiɭikan a siqaivuan au masan a pinairaŋan a sirukaian. aiʦu a "***" a inamiɭikan pinaka "siŋapurə" mavan a kəmasi maɭaj a kai a "siŋapura" aja, saka kəmasi auta tua van a kai "si*hapura" aja. aiʦu "si*hapura" a vəʦik, "simha" avan a "**" a imi, "pura" avan a kazaʦan a imi. avan sika izua zuma a siqaivuan a "**" aja. au izua aiʦu a vinəʦikan tua kuni kata ʎaiʦu a "***" aja a sinipukəʎaŋ tu na kuni a ɭaŋɭaŋan. tazua ka ʦaisaŋas ta sigapura masan ta kuni, aza sihu niamaɉu pinaka "***" aiʦu a ŋadan na kuni. ka **** a ʦaviʎan, aza sihu na sigapura ɭəmiŋɉəʎ ta matatəvətəvəʎan a kaŋadanan a ɉaɭan, avan sika napatagiʎ a masəŋsəŋ tua kaŋadanan na siqivuan a kaɉunaŋan kata ɉaɭan a pənuʎat nua i siŋapura. ka **** a ʦaviʎan sikasəpaʦ a qiʎasan ɖusa puɭuq sa ɭima a qadavan, aiʦu a "***" masan a paquɭid a ŋadan a ʦiniukuan. ʎakua kaʦaisaŋas ta masan a kuni i kaʦauan, aiʦu a sigapura izua ʦuruvu a siqaivuan, izua kata "***" aja, saka izua a zuma a maɉuɭu a siqaivuan pinaka "**", "**" kata "**" aja. kai sipatatəvəɭak nua ʦauʦau səsiŋapura a maʦaɭiaɭiaw a kinakaian. sikiʎavaran nua sihu a siŋapura izua kai a amiɭika, ʦiniukuan, kai a maɭaj, katua kai a tamiɭ. paʦara kai nua kuka a siŋapura, makəʎaŋ a pinapuvəʦik aiʦu a maɭaj nua kai a kuka i tua "huɭiʦ nua siŋapura a sinipaʎavak," ajatua ʦinaɭivatan niamaɉu tua maɭajsia. ʎakua, situɭutuɭu a kai a amiɭika nua sinsi a siŋapura i gaku i siŋapura. sa ʦaʎapazaŋaɭ a kai a amiɭika tua ʦauʦau a i siŋapura. paʦunu uta taiwan piɭipinas maɭajsia taiɭiku == kaizuanan ==
